description:
2025 Rolls Royce Cullinan Silver Badge, 6.75L V12, AWD, 592bhp, 8 Speed Automatic. AED 1,849,000 or AED 28,967 / Month with 60 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 6,600 KM - Rolls Royce Warranty Valid Until November 2028 or 200,000 KMs - Rolls Royce Service Contract Valid Until November 2028 or 200,000 KMs - Comes with 2 Keys - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Tempest Grey Exterior - Mandarin Interior - Climate Controlled Front Seats - Comfort Rear Seats - Ambient Air Package - Park Distance Control - Automatic High Beam Headlights Control - Driving Assistant - Adaptive Cruise Control incl. Stop and Go Function - Surround View - Park Assistant - Navigation System Professional - Full Seat Piping - Twin Coachline - Bespoke Interior - Extended Leather headliner - Automatic Door Close - Floor Mats in Lambs wool - Picnic Table
